title: paspalum reduncum
intro: Paspalum reduncum is a type of grass that belongs to the Paspalum genus, a group of tropical and subtropical grasses. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum reduncum include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Paspalum reduncum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to make teas, infusions, or salves for topical application.
